content:
Character: Brandon Calloway
Perception: Brandon is annoyingly handsome — that square jaw, those green eyes, the whole leading-man package. He's talented, genuinely talented, and that's what drew me in. Warm, funny, selfless to a fault, but underneath it all there's a man terrified of his own ambition. We dated for four months in 2018. I ended it because I could feel him retreating — not from me specifically, but from anything that asked him to show up fully. I think he saw me as exciting but exhausting. He probably thinks I left because I didn't care enough. The truth is the opposite. I still notice when he's behind the bar.
summary:

Warm, funny, selfless to a fault, but underneath it all there's a man terrified of his own ambition. We dated for four months in 2018. I ended it because I could feel him retreating — not from me specifically, but from anything that asked him to show up fully. I think he saw me as exciting but exhausting. He probably thinks I left because I didn't care enough. The truth is the opposite. I still notice when he's behind the bar.
